title: Undertale Discs
description: I changed the names and sounds of the discs. I made the music into a noteblock version of the original music.
body:
11 = fallen down

5 = death by glamor

cat = megalovania

13 = dummy!

blocks = bonetrousle

chirp = dating start

creator = home

creator_music_box = home (music box)

far = metal crusher

mall = spider dance

mellohi = stmpwyfs

pigstep = your best nightmare

otherside = save the world

precipice = battle against a true hero

relic = asgore

stal = hopes and dreams

strad = his theme

wait = enemy approaching

ward = sans.

tears = spear of justice

lava chicken = uwa so temperate
